languages.text: "Механизм центральной буровой установки поддерживает на плаву всю станцию. Если вы его уничтожите — то погубите всех местных рабочих, технику и себя заодно".
"The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
languages.original_text: "Механизм центральной буровой установки поддерживает на плаву всю станцию. Если вы его уничтожите — то погубите всех местных рабочих, технику и себя заодно".

traits.locale_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
"The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
"The central drill rig mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
"The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."
"The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

languages.text: 「中央のドリル装置が駅全体を浮上させている。それを破壊すれば、作業員、設備、そしてあなたたち全員が一気に滅びる」
languages.original_text: "The central drill rig mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: 「中央のドリル装置が駅全体を浮上させている。それを破壊すれば、作業員、設備、そしてあなたたち全員が一気に滅びる」

languages.text: «El mecanismo del complejo central es lo que mantiene a flote toda la estación. Si lo destruyen, condenarán a los trabajadores, a la maquinaria y a su propio grupo al mismo tiempo».
languages.original_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: «El mecanismo del complejo central es lo que mantiene a flote toda la estación. Si lo destruyen, condenarán a los trabajadores, a la maquinaria y a su propio grupo al mismo tiempo».

languages.text: “中央钻探中枢是维持整个星站悬浮的关键。毁了它，所有的工人、设备，连同你们自己，都得一起陪葬。”
languages.original_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: “中央钻探中枢是维持整个星站悬浮的关键。毁了它，所有的工人、设备，连同你们自己，都得一起陪葬。”

languages.text: "Der Mechanismus des zentralen Bohrkomplexes hält die ganze Station in der Luft. Wenn Ihr ihn zerstört, sind alle Arbeiter und die gesamte Ausrüstung verloren."
languages.original_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: "Der Mechanismus des zentralen Bohrkomplexes hält die ganze Station in der Luft. Wenn Ihr ihn zerstört, sind alle Arbeiter und die gesamte Ausrüstung verloren."

languages.text: "Merkezî sondaj kompleksi mekanizması, tüm istasyonu suyun üzerinde tutan şeydir. Eğer onu yok ederseniz tüm işçileri, ekipmanı ve kendinizi tek hamlede ölüme mahkûm edersiniz."
languages.original_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: "Merkezî sondaj kompleksi mekanizması, tüm istasyonu suyun üzerinde tutan şeydir. Eğer onu yok ederseniz tüm işçileri, ekipmanı ve kendinizi tek hamlede ölüme mahkûm edersiniz."

languages.text: « C'est le mécanisme du complexe central qui maintient la station à flot. Détruisez-le, et vous condamnerez aussi bien les ouvriers que l'équipement, sans parler de vous-mêmes. »
languages.original_text: "The central drill complex mechanism is what keeps the entire station afloat. If you destroy it, you will doom all the workers, the equipment, and yourselves in one fell swoop."

traits.locale_text: « C'est le mécanisme du complexe central qui maintient la station à flot. Détruisez-le, et vous condamnerez aussi bien les ouvriers que l'équipement, sans parler de vous-mêmes. »
